summary: Ribavirin is recognized as an antiviral medication used for preventing viral infections and has been considered for post-exposure prophylaxis in various contexts. Evidence indicates its potential application despite limited specific data on effectiveness against SARS-CoV-2; thus, options do exist within existing frameworks even if not widely recommended clinically.
